features.name: Metamagic
features.description: You gain the ability to shape your spells as they are being cast, but you can't use this feature until you finish a long rest. Choose one of the following metamagic options: Metamagic Arousal, Metamagic Echoes, or Metamagic Rhythms.

features.name: Metamagic Arousal
features.description: When you cast a spell that requires you to make an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can add your Charisma modifier to one of those rolls. You must choose this option before making the roll, and once you do so, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

features.name: Metamagic Echoes
features.description: When you cast a spell with a duration that extends over several turns, such as scorching ray or heat metal, you can use this feature to make the effect last longer. Choose one of the following effects: Extend Spell Duration, Extend Spell Range, or Extend Spell Area.

features.name: Metamagic Rhythms
features.description: When you cast a spell that affects multiple targets in a line (such as fireball), you can use this feature to affect additional targets without increasing the spell's level. You can choose to extend the spell by 10 feet for each additional target, but you must be within range of the original target.

features.name: Metamagic Arousal (improved)
features.description: You gain an additional use of Metamagic Arousal per long rest. Once you reach 14th level, you can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier, up to a maximum of three times.

features.name: Metamagic Echoes (improved)
features.description: When using Extend Spell Duration or Extend Spell Range with Metamagic Echoes, the duration is now doubled instead of increased by one turn. When using Extend Spell Area, you can affect an additional 5-foot radius for each additional target.

features.name: Metamagic Rhythms (improved)
features.description: When casting a spell that affects multiple targets in a line, you can choose to extend the spell by 15 feet for each additional target. You can also use this feature on spells with an area of effect, increasing the radius of the area by 5 feet.

features.name: Metamagic Arousal (maximized)
features.description: When using Metamagic Arousal, you can add your Charisma modifier twice to one roll. You must choose this option before making the roll, and once you do so, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

features.name: Metamagic Echoes (maximized)
features.description: When using Extend Spell Duration with Metamagic Echoes, the spell lasts for three times its normal duration. When using Extend Spell Range or Extend Spell Area, the increase is tripled instead of doubled.

features.name: Metamagic Rhythms (maximized)
features.description: When casting a spell that affects multiple targets in a line, you can choose to extend the spell by 20 feet for each additional target. You can also use this feature on spells with an area of effect, increasing the radius of the area by 10 feet.

features.name: First Warrior’s Training
features.description: You gain the Battle Master or Archetype feature of your choice.

features.name: Second Warrior's Gift
features.description: Choose a cantrip from the warlock spell list. You can cast it using a first-level spell slot, and you regain the use of this feature at 6th level and every four levels thereafter.

features.name: Metamagic Options
features.description: You gain access to three of the following metamagic options: Quickened Spell, Empowered Spell, Heightened Spell, Silent Spell, Scorching Spell, Subtle Spell, or Extended Spell. You can use one on a spell you cast at this level unless otherwise noted.
